plugins.name: ccaf-practice-audit
plugins.description: CCA-F best-practice project audits that double as exam prep — explanation-only teaching with task-statement and distractor-pattern mapping, auto-triggered on significant change (opt-in per repo).

plugins.name: ccaf-exam-tech-foundation
plugins.description: The prerequisite layer for CCA-F study — teaches the ~38 foundational CS concepts (JSON, glob, env vars, caching, MCP…) a non-technical learner needs, each anchored to the exam topic where it appears.

plugins.name: ccaf-mock-exam-analysis
plugins.description: The backward loop — turn a completed CCA-F mock exam into a targeted study plan: per-miss domain + root-cause classification, distractor-pattern tagging, trend comparison across mocks, days-until-exam drill plan.
